haikus.haiku:
Beef aromas rise,
Sizzling dreams on the grill glow,
Gather ‘round, taste joy.
Happy #NationalPrimeRibDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Gentle giants roam,
Muddy banks and leafy greens,
Nature's quiet grace.
Happy #WorldTapirDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Cedar trees stand tall,
Echoes of wisdom ring clear,
Nature’s voice calls bright.
#HappyBirthdayRalphWaldoEmerson from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker bright,
Notes of joy in the air sing,
Morse's spark ignites.
#HappyBirthdaySamuelMorse from @ClamBakeSanta
